automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: Automate workflows across all Aexy modules

empty.title: No automations yet
empty.description: Connect a trigger to an action and let Aexy do the repetitive work. Start from a template or build your own.

delete.title: Delete this automation?
delete.description: All scheduled runs and execution history will be lost. This cannot be undone.

removeAgentTrigger.title: Remove this agent trigger?
removeAgentTrigger.description: The agent will no longer be invoked when this automation runs.

builder.addTriggerHint: Pick a trigger to get started
builder.addActionHint: Drop an action next to the trigger
builder.fromTemplateTail: - customize the workflow below, then save.

gallery.title: Pick a starting point
gallery.subtitle: Templates wire up the trigger and the first few actions for you. You can rewire anything on the canvas afterward.
gallery.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword or pick a module from the filter.

blankCard.title: Start from scratch
blankCard.subtitle: Empty canvas
blankCard.description: Drop in your own trigger and actions. Best when no template matches what you're building.
